name: Free Mode Smoke Fixture
description: Test fixture for scripts/smoke/free-mode-e2e-smoke.mjs: one free function, one paid function, and one inference function. Used to prove the Free Mode gates (paid blocked, AI-without-BYOK blocked, free allowed) against a live deployment. Stays private; never goes live.

free_ping.description: Free function (price 0, no inference). Must RUN in Free Mode.

paid_ping.description: Paid function (priced via gx.set, no inference). Must be BLOCKED in Free Mode (free_mode_paid_blocked).

ai_ping.description: Inference function (calls galactic.ai). Must be BLOCKED in Free Mode without BYOK (free_mode_ai_requires_byok).

prompt.description: Ignored in Free Mode — the call is blocked before execution.
